recommendations.title: Matriarch
recommendations.overview: Afflicted with a mysterious disease after surviving an overdose, a woman returns to her childhood home to confront her personal demons but instead discovers a real one.

recommendations.title: Don't Sleep
recommendations.overview: After moving into a cottage together, two young lovers confront horrors of a forgotten childhood.

recommendations.title: Pet Sematary: Bloodlines
recommendations.overview: In 1969, young Jud Crandall has dreams of leaving his hometown behind, but soon discovers sinister secrets buried within and is forced to confront a dark family history that forever binds him to Ludlow.

recommendations.title: Hostage Radio
recommendations.overview: A radio host is kidnapped on air and forced to tell secrets about his past.

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.

recommendations.title: Grand Isle
recommendations.overview: Walter and his neglected wife lure a young man into their Victorian home to escape a hurricane. When the man is charged with murder by Det. Jones, he must reveal the couple's wicked secrets to save himself.

recommendations.title: What We Become
recommendations.overview: A family of four is quarantined in their home as a virulent strand of the flu spreads into town and they are forced to the extreme to escape alive.

recommendations.title: Coming Home in the Dark
recommendations.overview: A school teacher is forced to confront a brutal act from his past when a pair of ruthless drifters takes him and his family on a nightmare road-trip.

recommendations.title: Salem's Lot
recommendations.overview: Author Ben Mears returns to his childhood home of Jerusalem's Lot only to discover his hometown is being preyed upon by a bloodthirsty vampire.

recommendations.title: The Return
recommendations.overview: After the death of his father, a brilliant college student returns to his family home where he learns that the horrors from his childhood aren't as dead and gone as he once thought.
